application_type.description: The type of application to create.

description.example: An application for managing user access

scopes.description: The OAuth scopes granted to the application.

default.description: Whether this is the default redirect URI.

uses_pkce.description: Whether the application uses PKCE (Proof Key for Code Exchange).

is_first_party.description: Whether this is a first-party application. Third-party applications require an organization_id.

organization_id.description: The organization ID this application belongs to. Required when is_first_party is false.
